name: ar-consolidated
description: Unified AR department app: TDS 194Q + Cheque Management + Uncategorized Suspense Payments. React + Node, deployed on Vercel + Render.

scripts.start:local: concurrently -k -n worker,api,web -c blue,green,magenta "npm run dev:worker" "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:web"
scripts.build:all: npm run build:worker && npm run build:web
scripts.typecheck: tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit && npm run typecheck --workspace apps/web && npm run typecheck --workspace worker
